word: G1226 - διαβεβαιόομαι - diabebaióomai - dee-ab-eb-ahee-o'-om-ahee - Affirm constantly

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διαβεβαιόομαι

- Transliteration: Diabebaioomai

- Phonetic: dee-ab-eb-ahee-o'-om-ahee

- Definition:

1. to affirm strongly, assert confidently

- Origin: middle voice of a compound of G1223 and G950

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Middle voice of a compound of G1223 and G950; to confirm thoroughly (by words) that is asseverate: - affirm constantly.
